market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Spacious 3BR Home with Carport Parking – Mayflower
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your perfect getaway at Mayflower – a spacious three‑bedroom house perfectly suited for families or small groups. Rated 4.73 stars from 306 guest reviews, this entire‑home retreat offers the comfort of seven cozy beds and two modern showers, while comfortably accommodating up to four guests. Situated in a quiet neighbourhood, the property boasts a dedicated carport for hassle‑free parking, ensuring you never have to hunt for a spot.

Enjoy a well‑appointed living area where natural light floods the space, a fully equipped kitchen for home‑cooked meals, and a dining nook ideal for sharing stories over breakfast. Each bedroom is thoughtfully arranged to maximize privacy and rest, and the two clean, contemporary bathrooms provide a fresh start each morning. At £209.40 per night, you receive premium space and amenities that stand out in the market.

With a current occupancy of just 15.2% for the next 90 days—well below the city median of 28.3%—there’s ample opportunity to secure this home for your next stay. Whether you’re exploring local attractions, enjoying a quiet weekend, or hosting a small family reunion, Mayflower delivers the space, privacy, and convenience you need. Book now and experience the blend of comfort and convenience that guests love.

*Capacity: 4 guests • 3 bedrooms • 7 beds • 2 showers • Carport parking • Rating: 4.73 (306 reviews)*
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space (garden or patio) – a high‑value amenity guests seek
Entertainment options (TV, streaming, games) – missing from listing
Clear parking details (dedicated carport) – not listed under amenities
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use an exterior shot showing the house frontage and carport as the cover photo to highlight the free parking advantage and curb appeal.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate is £209.40, about 20% above the cohort median (£175) while occupancy is only 15.2% versus the market median of 28.3% – a price‑occupancy mismatch that hurts bookings.
No amenities are listed despite missing high‑value categories like outdoor space, entertainment, and explicit parking; adding these will improve search ranking and guest appeal.
The description is virtually empty; a compelling, SEO‑rich description of 200‑300 words will increase conversion and convey the property’s strengths.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced £209/night – roughly 20% above the market median of £175 – yet only 15% of nights are booked in the next 90 days, compared with a 28% median occupancy.
